title: Aurora Cannabis Announces Fiscal 2023 Second Quarter Results
text: Aurora Cannabis announced financial and operational results for fiscal second quarter ended December 31, 2022 on February 9, 2023. Revenue and financial performance: Total net revenue was $61.7 million, compared to $49.3 million in prior quarter and $60.6 million in prior year period. Company achieved positive Adjusted EBITDA of $1.4 million, compared to negative $7.4 million in Q1 2023. Segment breakdown: Medical Cannabis $39.5 million (64% of total revenue), up 25% sequentially, delivering key revenue driver. Consumer Cannabis $14.6 million (24% of total revenue), up 7% quarter-over-quarter. Plant Propagation $6.6 million from Bevo acquisition. Key metrics: Company maintained strong adjusted gross margins at 49% on core cannabis revenue, though down from 54% in prior quarter. Medical cannabis margins remained robust at 61%. CEO Miguel Martin stated the firm had delivered on commitment to achieve positive Adjusted EBITDA in Q2 2023, following tremendous effort to realize approximately $340 million of total annualized savings since February 2020. Balance sheet strength: Aurora maintained approximately $310 million in cash and reported net cash of $130.3 million, described as among the strongest in the industry. Company repurchased $128.7 million in convertible notes during quarter.
